meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop letting a lack of portfolio stall your SaaS dreams. Learn to build a professional MVP rapidly using Antigravity and Claude Code in this guide.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders don't need a back catalog—they need a high-converting MVP. By leveraging a SaaS starter kit, you bypass months of boilerplate development. Use Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code to execute features, turning your vision into a live, revenue-generating asset instantly.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the vision, the market insight, and the drive, yet you find yourself paralyzed by the 'no portfolio' syndrome. You believe you need years of engineering history to command trust, but the market only cares about one thing: does your solution solve their burning problem? 

We are shifting the paradigm today. You aren't building a portfolio; you are building a business. By utilizing a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you strip away the friction of authentication, database schema, and payment integration. Let's trade the anxiety of 'starting from scratch' for the velocity of a pre-engineered foundation, designed to scale with your first paying customers.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Establish the core stack using a production-grade starter kit to ensure security and scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 14 SaaS starter project with Tailwind CSS, Supabase authentication, and Stripe checkout integration pre-configured.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Map your database schema to the specific pain point you are solving to ensure the MVP is lean and focused.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS focused on [Insert Niche] with tables for users, subscriptions, and core data entities.

steps.title: Implement High-Conversion UI
steps.description: Build the landing page and dashboard using pre-built components to maximize speed-to-market.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting landing page component using Shadcn UI that emphasizes the primary benefit of my SaaS.

steps.title: Connect the Payment Gateway
steps.description: Integrate Stripe to validate your business model immediately, moving from 'project' to 'product'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe webhook handler to update user subscription status in Supabase when a payment is successful.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Push your code to Vercel to get a live, shareable URL for early beta testers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment config file for Vercel ensuring all environment variables are mapped correctly.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Stripe-first' development; if you can't collect money, you don't have a SaaS, you have a hobby.
Use mock data for your first 10 users to simulate a 'busy' platform and build social proof.
Never build custom auth; use Clerk or Supabase Auth to save 40+ hours of security engineering.
Keep your MVP focused on one single feature that solves one acute pain point—do not build a feature factory.
Automate your feedback loop by integrating a simple Tally form directly into your dashboard to capture user complaints.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, share your live link in three targeted communities within your niche, collect feedback, and iterate on your first feature update within 48 hours.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the blueprint to stop hiding behind a lack of portfolio and start building a business that generates actual revenue. The difference between a dreamer and a founder is the first commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
